original_image_tags: The document page appears heavily blacked out or on dark paper with white text and stamps. The word "RESTRICTED" is stamped in large, faint block letters near the top center and again in the lower half of the page. There are two punch holes on the left margin. A small handwritten number "866" is visible in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: Typed text fragment at the top and a large faint stamp in the center. Top text reads: 'disc". It was described as speeding southward from Yugoslavia at a height of about 3,000 feet, making a noise like an artillery shell.' Center stamp reads: 'RESTRICTED'. Two punch holes on the left edge. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are visible.

judge.reason: The descriptions disagree on the specific text content of the document page, with Description A focusing on stamps and structure while Description B quotes specific typed body text about a speeding object and explicitly states 'No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are visible.'
